description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a low-pitched, hipped roof and a rectangular footprint. The exterior walls are clad in a reddish-brown material, likely brick or siding, with white trim around the windows and doors. The front facade features a set of symmetrically arranged windows and a central entrance, while the sides have additional windows for natural light. A driveway leads up to the house, with two cars parked in front, and a small detached structure or garage is visible to one side. The roof is a simple, broad hip style, providing a classic suburban appearance. The property is surrounded by paved surfaces, suggesting an urban or suburban neighborhood context.
description: A single-story, brick-clad bungalow with a hipped roof, symmetrical windows, and a driveway with parked cars.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and the driveway with two cars parked to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, two parked cars, and the row of windows along the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back facade with additional windows and the detached garage or structure to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the side windows and the paved area extending behind the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with evenly spaced side windows
